evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-1: Aortic Stenosis Surveillance Imaging Overdue
gapsPushIds: Echo surveillance overdue for aortic stenosis
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-1

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-002: Severe SYMPTOMATIC AS - AVR not referred. COR 1.
gapsPushIds: AVR not referred for severe symptomatic aortic stenosis
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-002

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-006: Asymptomatic severe AS + LV dysfunction (Class IIa AVR). COR 2a.
gapsPushIds: AVR not referred for asymptomatic severe AS with LV dysfunction (Class IIa)
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-006

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-003: Low-flow low-gradient (classical, low-EF) AS - dobutamine stress echo not performed. COR 1.
gapsPushIds: Low-flow low-gradient AS: dobutamine stress echo not performed
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-003

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-004: Paradoxical low-flow low-gradient AS (preserved EF). COR 2a.
gapsPushIds: Paradoxical low-flow low-gradient AS: stroke-volume/flow assessment needed
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-004

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-050: Moderate AS - severity-grading / surveillance + integrated clarification. COR 1 (surveillance).
gapsPushIds: Moderate AS: severity-grading surveillance / integrated clarification
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-050

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-014: Severe PRIMARY MR - surgical referral. COR 1 (symptomatic) / 2a (asymptomatic + LV trigger).
gapsPushIds: Surgical referral not documented for severe primary mitral regurgitation
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-014

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-016: Severe primary MR + new AF - surgical Class IIa.
gapsPushIds: Surgery not considered for severe primary MR with new atrial fibrillation (Class IIa)
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-016

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-017: Severe primary MR + pulmonary hypertension (PASP>50) - surgical Class IIa.
gapsPushIds: Surgery not considered for severe primary MR with pulmonary hypertension (Class IIa)
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-017

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-022: Severe TR -> transcatheter (T-TEER/TTVR) evaluation gap (AUDIT-125 severity-gated)
gapsPushIds: Severe symptomatic TR: transcatheter tricuspid (T-TEER/TTVR) evaluation gap
Severe TR (no CIED lead): Evoque TTVR (TRISCEND) candidacy for device selection
Severe TR with CIED lead: device selection requires lead-status + coaptation-gap assessment
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-022

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-069: Evoque TTVR (TRISCEND) candidacy - the NO-lead severe-TR device pathway
gapsPushIds: Severe TR (no CIED lead): Evoque TTVR (TRISCEND) candidacy for device selection
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-069

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-023: TR device selection with CIED lead - lead-status + coaptation-gap pathway
gapsPushIds: Severe TR with CIED lead: device selection requires lead-status + coaptation-gap assessment
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-023

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-5: Structural Heart Imaging Follow-up
gapsPushIds: Structural heart imaging follow-up recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-5

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-6: Post-TAVR Follow-up
gapsPushIds: Post-TAVR follow-up recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-6

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-7: Endocarditis Prophylaxis Review
gapsPushIds: Endocarditis prophylaxis review recommended
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-7

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-8: Left Atrial Appendage Assessment
gapsPushIds: Left atrial appendage assessment recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-8

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-10: Secondary MR transcatheter repair (TEER) - GDMT-FIRST. COR 2a (COAPT).
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-10

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-064: Transcatheter MVR candidacy for severe MR with non-TEER anatomy. COR 2a.
gapsPushIds: Transcatheter mitral valve replacement candidacy recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-064

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-13: Paravalvular Leak Assessment Post-Valve
gapsPushIds: Paravalvular leak assessment recommended for review post-valve replacement
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-13

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-14: Adult Congenital Heart Disease Screen
gapsPushIds: Adult congenital heart disease specialist referral recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-14

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-15: Alcohol Septal Ablation Candidacy
gapsPushIds: Alcohol septal ablation candidacy recommended for review in symptomatic HCM
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-15

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-16: WATCHMAN Device Follow-up
gapsPushIds: WATCHMAN device follow-up recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-16

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-17: 3D Echo for Structural Planning
gapsPushIds: 3D echocardiography recommended for review for structural intervention planning
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-17

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-052: Marfan syndrome -> beta-blocker or ARB to slow aortic growth
gapsPushIds: Marfan with aortic dilation not on beta-blocker or ARB (aortic-growth prophylaxis)
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-052

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-072: Ascending aorta at intervention threshold -> surgical evaluation (SUBGROUP-AWARE threshold)
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-072

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-074: Uncomplicated type-B aortic dissection -> optimal medical therapy (impulse control)
gapsPushIds: Uncomplicated type-B aortic dissection not on optimal medical therapy (impulse control)
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-074

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-075: Complicated type-B aortic dissection -> urgent TEVAR evaluation
gapsPushIds: Complicated type-B aortic dissection (malperfusion): urgent TEVAR evaluation gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-075

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-054: Turner syndrome -> cardiac surveillance (echo + aortic imaging)
gapsPushIds: Turner syndrome without cardiac surveillance on file (echo + aortic imaging)
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-054

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-055: Vascular Ehlers-Danlos (Q79.63) -> celiprolol + comprehensive vascular surveillance
gapsPushIds: Vascular Ehlers-Danlos not on celiprolol / comprehensive vascular surveillance
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-055

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-026: PFO + cryptogenic stroke (age<60) -> closure evaluation
gapsPushIds: PFO + cryptogenic stroke (age<60): closure evaluation gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-026

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-027: Hemodynamically significant ASD -> closure evaluation
gapsPushIds: Hemodynamically significant ASD: closure evaluation gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-027

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-029: Infective endocarditis with an early-surgery indication -> surgery review
gapsPushIds: Infective endocarditis with an early-surgery indication: surgery evaluation gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-029

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-091: High-risk (massive) PE -> systemic lysis / embolectomy / ECMO evaluation
gapsPushIds: Massive (high-risk) PE with instability: reperfusion evaluation gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-091

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-101: Eisenmenger physiology -> PAH-specific therapy evaluation
gapsPushIds: Eisenmenger physiology without PAH-specific therapy evaluation
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-101

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-096: Adult repaired Tetralogy of Fallot -> pulmonary valve replacement evaluation
gapsPushIds: Adult Tetralogy of Fallot: pulmonary valve replacement evaluation gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-096

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-099: Ebstein anomaly -> arrhythmia surveillance
gapsPushIds: Ebstein anomaly without arrhythmia surveillance on file
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-099

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-103: Benign cardiac neoplasm (atrial myxoma) -> surgical referral
gapsPushIds: Benign cardiac neoplasm (atrial myxoma): surgical referral gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-103

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-059: Post-AVR antithrombotic regimen review (de-escalation)
gapsPushIds: Post-AVR on dual antiplatelet: antithrombotic regimen reassessment gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-059

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-057: Post-AVR new LBBB -> ambulatory rhythm monitoring
gapsPushIds: Post-AVR new LBBB without ambulatory rhythm monitoring
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-057

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-060: Post-AVR high-grade AV block -> permanent pacing decision
gapsPushIds: Post-AVR high-grade AV block: permanent pacing decision gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-060

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-012: Prosthetic valve structural deterioration (elevated gradient)
gapsPushIds: Prosthetic valve with elevated gradient: structural deterioration evaluation gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-012

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-092: Post-PE CTEPH surveillance
gapsPushIds: Post-PE persistent dyspnea: CTEPH surveillance workup gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-092

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-095: Coarctation of the aorta -> serial imaging surveillance
gapsPushIds: Coarctation of the aorta without serial imaging surveillance
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-095

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-097: Systemic right ventricle (ccTGA / d-TGA post-atrial-switch) -> ACHD-center surveillance
gapsPushIds: Systemic right ventricle (ccTGA / TGA) without dedicated ACHD-center surveillance
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-097

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-082: Post-ASD/PFO/VSD closure without an antithrombotic regimen
gapsPushIds: Post-septal-closure device without an antithrombotic regimen
Post-septal-closure without surveillance echo (residual-shunt assessment)
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-082

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-083: Post-closure residual-shunt surveillance echo
gapsPushIds: Post-septal-closure without surveillance echo (residual-shunt assessment)
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-083

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-065: Post-mitral-TEER surveillance echo
gapsPushIds: Post-mitral-TEER without annual surveillance echo
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-065

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap SH-066: Recurrent significant MR after mitral TEER -> reassessment (redo TEER vs surgery)
gapsPushIds: Recurrent significant MR after mitral TEER: heart-team reassessment gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-066

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // SH-BICUSPID: Bicuspid Aortic Valve Surveillance
gapsPushIds: Consider echocardiographic surveillance for bicuspid aortic valve
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-BICUSPID

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // SH-ROSS: Ross Procedure Candidacy
gapsPushIds: Consider Ross procedure candidacy evaluation for young patient with severe AS
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-ROSS

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // SH-VALVE-IN-VALVE: Valve-in-Valve TAVR Evaluation
gapsPushIds: Consider valve-in-valve TAVR evaluation for symptomatic bioprosthetic valve dysfunction
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-VALVE-IN-VALVE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // SH-VSD: VSD Closure Evaluation
gapsPushIds: Consider VSD closure evaluation for ventricular septal defect
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-VSD

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // SH-COARCTATION: Coarctation of Aorta Follow-up
gapsPushIds: Consider coarctation surveillance and hypertension management
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-COARCTATION

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // SH-FONTAN: Fontan Surveillance
gapsPushIds: Consider comprehensive Fontan surveillance evaluation
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-FONTAN

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // SH-CARCINOID: Carcinoid Valve Disease Screening
gapsPushIds: Consider carcinoid valve disease screening and surveillance
evaluatorBlocks.name: SH-CARCINOID
